name: forward_geocode
description: Convert a text address or place name into geographic coordinates (longitude, latitude). Returns ranked results as a GeoJSON FeatureCollection with detailed address components, confidence scores, and bounding boxes.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: The search text (address, place name, or POI). Max 256 characters.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return (1-10). Default is 5.

parameters.name: proximity
parameters.description: Bias results toward a location, formatted as 'longitude,latitude'.

parameters.name: country
parameters.description: Comma-separated ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country codes to limit results.

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: IETF language tag for result language preference.

parameters.name: types
parameters.description: Comma-separated feature types to filter results (country, region, postcode, district, place, locality, neighborhood, address, street, block).

parameters.name: bbox
parameters.description: Bounding box to restrict results, formatted as 'minLon,minLat,maxLon,maxLat'.

properties.name: 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue NW
properties.full_address: 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue NW, Washington, District of Columbia 20500, United States
